Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Interface PathValidator

All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleObjectValidator<PathValidator,​Path>
All Known Implementing Classes:
PathValidatorImpl, PathValidatorNoOp
public interface PathValidator
extends ExtensibleObjectValidator<PathValidator,​Path>
Validates the requirements of a Path.

All methods (except those found in ExtensibleObjectValidator) imply ExtensibleObjectValidator.isNotNull().

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    PathValidator exists()
    Ensures that the actual value exists.
    PathValidator isAbsolute()
    Ensures that the actual value is absolute.
    PathValidator isDirectory​(LinkOption... options)
    Ensures that the actual value refers to a directory.
    PathValidator isRegularFile​(LinkOption... options)
    Ensures that the actual value refers to a regular file.
    PathValidator isRelative()
    Ensures that the actual value is relative.

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectValidator

    asString, asString, getActual, getFailures, isActualAvailable, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs

  • Method Details

    • exists

      PathValidator exists()
      Ensures that the actual value exists.

      Note that the result of this method is immediately outdated. If this method indicates the file exists then there is no guarantee that a subsequence access will succeed. Care should be taken when using this method in security sensitive applications.

      Returns:
      the updated validator

    • isAbsolute

      PathValidator isAbsolute()
      Ensures that the actual value is absolute.
      Returns:
      the updated validator

    • isDirectory

      PathValidator isDirectory​(LinkOption... options)
      Ensures that the actual value refers to a directory.
      Parameters:
      options - options indicating how symbolic links are handled
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if options is null

    • isRegularFile

      PathValidator isRegularFile​(LinkOption... options)
      Ensures that the actual value refers to a regular file.
      Parameters:
      options - options indicating how symbolic links are handled
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if options is null

    • isRelative

      PathValidator isRelative()
      Ensures that the actual value is relative.
      Returns:
      the updated validator
